VirtualInHttp.HintText: BKW Dynamic Feed-in Tariff CH. Polls the local proxy every 900 s. Replace REPLACE_WITH_PROXY_HOST with the reachable Docker host. Use the LOXONE Spot Price Optimizer in Absolute mode.
VirtualInHttp.Title: bkw-tariff-proxy

VirtualInHttpCmd.Title: BKW Status Code
VirtualInHttpCmd.HintText: 0=OK: complete tariff day; run. 1=No data: block. 2=Stale/wrong day: block. 3=BKW API error: block. 4=More than one hour missing/incomplete: block. 5=Unknown unit: block. 10=Degraded: one missing hour zero-filled; run with warning. 99=Internal error: block. Guard: allow only 0 or 10. A tariff value of 0.000 CHF/kWh is valid.

VirtualInHttpCmd.Title: BKW h00
VirtualInHttpCmd.HintText: Absolute local hour 00:00. Source: feedin_h00_mchf_kwh. Correction 0 -> 0 and 1000 -> 1 converts integer mCHF/kWh to CHF/kWh. Signed values are enabled; negative tariffs are valid.

VirtualInHttpCmd.Title: BKW h01
VirtualInHttpCmd.HintText: Absolute local hour 01:00. Source: feedin_h01_mchf_kwh. Correction 0 -> 0 and 1000 -> 1 converts integer mCHF/kWh to CHF/kWh. Signed values are enabled; negative tariffs are valid.

VirtualInHttpCmd.Title: BKW h02
VirtualInHttpCmd.HintText: Absolute local hour 02:00. Source: feedin_h02_mchf_kwh. Correction 0 -> 0 and 1000 -> 1 converts integer mCHF/kWh to CHF/kWh. Signed values are enabled; negative tariffs are valid.
